dishes.name: CHERNOBYL BURGER
dishes.raw_description: Prepare for an explosion of flavor with our bold new Chernobyl Burger! Nestled in a soft, chewy vegan pretzel bun, this beast features two juicy beef patties stacked high with a generous layer of caramelized ground bacon—slow-cooked in rich maple syrup and cracked black pepper for the perfect sweet, provolone cheese, smoky, and spicy crunch. Finished with a creamy, fiery chipotle sauce that delivers a smoky heat that lingers just right. It’s sweet, savory, spicy, and dangerously addictive — one bite and you’ll understand why this burger radiates pure power. Warning: Highly addictive. Proceed with an empty stomach and big appetite.
dishes.reasoning: Contains beef patties, bacon, and provolone cheese. | evidence: “two juicy beef patties, caramelized ground bacon, provolone cheese”
dishes.address: 1006 E Altamonte Dr #1002, Altamonte Springs, FL 32701, USA
